metadata.name: Check on an Existing Claim Status

description: A customer who filed a home insurance claim for water damage a week ago is calling for an update.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and locate their open claim.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the open water damage claim.

nodes.task_description: Review the claim notes to find the latest update.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reads the notes and finds that the adjuster has visited and is waiting for the repair estimate.

nodes.task_description: Provide a clear update to the customer and set the expectation for the next communication.

expected_outcome.value: Agent informs the customer about the pending estimate and that the adjuster will call them within 2 business days.
